gitCommit.subject: feat: Set up Vercel Flags with my-first-flag
gitCommit.body:
feat: Set up Vercel Flags with my-first-flag

- Install flags and @flags-sdk/vercel packages
- Create lib/flags.ts with myFirstFlag declaration using vercelAdapter
- Set up Flags Explorer endpoint at app/.well-known/vercel/flags/route.ts
- Add test page at app/flags-test/page.tsx to verify flag status
- Pull environment variables (FLAGS and FLAGS_SECRET) from Vercel
- Verified build and deployment to production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
